input.background: A patient newly diagnosed with a serious ailment is told he has a 60% probability of surviving 5 or more years.
input.question: Explain the meaning of this statement to someone with no statistical background in terms he or she will understand.

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性
output.answer: We can not say for certain whether this particular patient will survive, but we can say that in a large number of patients with identical characteristics, 60% will survive at least five years and 40% will not.

survival_probability.description: The probability (in percentage) that the patient will survive for 5 or more years.

time_period.description: The time period (in years) over which the survival probability is measured.
